lesson_adopted: Like the crypto market reports, every DueSight section must translate raw engine output into concrete intelligence, verification, risk/blindspot and action.

pillar_contract.must_show: legal/operating identity, exact-entity match and source routes
pillar_contract.verification: target-owned page, registry/provider route, source envelope
pillar_contract.risk_or_blindspot: name collisions, stale aggregators, missing current extract
pillar_contract.official_close_route: current registry/provider extract with source hash

pillar_contract.must_show: what the company actually does and how it appears to operate
pillar_contract.verification: website/team/careers/customer pages and public transaction context

pillar_contract.must_show: roles, skills, customer sectors, competitors and scarcity thesis
pillar_contract.verification: vacancy pages, competitor pages, news and sector sources
pillar_contract.risk_or_blindspot: live vacancies and market counts can change quickly
pillar_contract.official_close_route: archived vacancy scrape and timestamped source pack

pillar_contract.must_show: professional/social corroboration, sentiment and adverse context
pillar_contract.verification: source-enveloped social/professional URLs and sentiment source breakdown
pillar_contract.risk_or_blindspot: social is corroboration only; raw username hits stay internal
pillar_contract.official_close_route: repeatable social/sentiment run with promoted source list

pillar_contract.must_show: finance routes, growth signals and document request list
pillar_contract.verification: filings, provider documents, primary award artifacts
pillar_contract.risk_or_blindspot: no hard revenue or margin claim without source-hash document

pillar_contract.must_show: public group narrative and ownership questions
pillar_contract.verification: acquisition source, registry route, provider graph route
pillar_contract.risk_or_blindspot: transaction narrative is not UBO/shareholder proof
pillar_contract.official_close_route: UBO/shareholder extract or licensed ownership graph

pillar_contract.must_show: public exposure, sanctions/media checks, privacy/NIS2 questions
pillar_contract.verification: asset-attributed scans, sanctions source and adverse media ledger
pillar_contract.official_close_route: asset owner confirmation, directors/UBO screening and evidence ledger

public_report_rule: No section may be only workflow explanation. It must show what DueSight found, how it was verified, the risk/blindspot, and how to upgrade to official proof.
